server_timing.note: Estimated from CrUX TTFB N/A and site speed observations

issues.title: Missing sitemap.xml
issues.description: No sitemap.xml found. Search engines cannot efficiently discover and index site pages.
fix_steps: Generate sitemap.xml with all site URLs

issues.title: No structured data (Schema.org)
issues.description: Missing JSON-LD schemas. Impacts rich snippets, knowledge graph eligibility, and AI visibility (GEO).
fix_steps: Add Organization schema with name, logo, address, founder, foundingDate (2013)
Add WebSite schema with potential action (search)
Add Service schemas for each payment solution
Validate with Google Rich Results Test

issues.title: Missing robots.txt
issues.description: No robots.txt file. Cannot guide crawlers or disallow sensitive paths.
fix_steps: Create robots.txt with User-agent: * and Allow: /

issues.title: Title tag too short
issues.description: Title 'Paymatico' (9 chars) is too short. Missing keyword optimization opportunity.
fix_steps: Example: 'Paymático — Plataforma de Pagos Regulada BdE | PSP España'

issues.title: Missing canonical tag
issues.description: No canonical tag. Risk of duplicate content issues if URL variations exist.
fix_steps: Apply to all pages, pointing to preferred version

issues.title: Branding genérico en title/H1
issues.description: Title y H1 usan lenguaje genérico ('PSP Todo en Uno'). No capitaliza diferenciadores únicos (BdE, stack propietario).
fix_steps: H1 nuevo: 'Plataforma de Pagos Regulada BdE | Infraestructura Propietaria'
Diferenciar vs competencia: 'Stack propietario, no intermediarios'

score.note: Score based on health checks only (Lighthouse lab data unavailable). CrUX metrics passed.
